title: Diamante
overview: Ezequiel lives on the banks of the Paraná River, grew up in a traditional fishing village, lived a lonely and sensitive childhood with his environment, attached to his mother and sisters. He wants to be a fisherman, he learns by watching his father and his grandfather who teach him to fish and hunt.
